title: Day 01: The 2 AM Gym vs Biryani Loop
body: My brain is completely not braining and sleep is absolutely not sleeping. My face is hosting a full acne festival, but somehow my stomach is untouched, fearless, and ready for war.
It is literally 2:00 in the morning. I looked into the cooker and saw pure biryani sitting there, staring back at me like destiny with masala. Come on. Let's eat.
Also, plot twist: morning is technically Day 01 at the gym. I have already paid 2.5K upfront, which means I did not join a gym. I bought a monthly subscription to guilt.
In the middle of all this, I am also jobless yet buying formals. Because apparently my bank balance is unemployed, but my outfit is preparing for appraisal season.

So this is the loop: biryani at 2 AM, gym in the morning, formals with no job, confidence at 4%, hope at 7%, delusion at full battery. Absolute tactical self-sabotage, but at least now it has documentation.

scraps.title: 2.5K paid. Guilt activated.
scraps.text: I did not join a gym. I purchased a monthly subscription to being judged by dumbbells.

image.alt: Cropped gym bill showing the 2500 rupee membership fee

scraps.title: Jobless yet buying formals
scraps.text: No job. No offer letter. Still dressing like HR is hiding behind the trial-room curtain.

scraps.title: Corporate cosplay unlocked
scraps.text: Income: pending. Shirt: serious. Pants: optimistic. Confidence: borrowed from future me.

image.alt: Yaswanth trying formal clothes in a mirror selfie

scraps.title: 8 AM realme lens report
items: Background audio: "Velli brush chey ra gadida"
Face: politely pretending life is sorted

scraps.title: Morning face, family direction
scraps.text: At 8 AM, through my father's realme lens: "Velli brush chey ra gadida." Cinema.

image.alt: Morning portrait taken through father's realme phone

gallery.caption: Jobless, but interview-ready for imaginary HR.
8 AM. Father's realme. "Velli brush chey ra gadida."
